_comment: Experience and Attributes config. Edit values freely. Re-launch game to apply.

debug._comment_verbose: Set true to enable trace logging (skill hook intercepts, event details). WARNING: generates large log files.
debug._comment_max_log_files: Maximum number of session log files to keep in the Spike folder. Oldest are deleted first.

xp_sources._comment: XP awarded per action. All values are floats.

kill._comment: base_* = XP awarded per enemy type. level_scale_factor multiplies the level-delta bonus: bonus = max(0, enemy_level - player_level) * level_scale_factor.

pickpocket._comment: XP awarded per successful pickpocket attempt (tracked via 'Items Pickpocketed' stat).

book._comment: new_book only awarded if the book has not been read before. skill_book uses the same value for now.

lockpick._comment: Will be expanded in a future task. Lock level read from TESLockPickedEvent.

leveling._comment: xp_base maps to fXPLevelUpBase, xp_increase to fXPLevelUpMult.
leveling._comment_cap: xp_cap clamps the threshold so leveling never becomes a chore at high levels.
leveling._comment_testing: For fast testing use xp_base=5, xp_increase=1, xp_cap=1000.
